titles.arabic: باب قَدْرِ مَا بَيْنَ السُّحُورِ وَبَيْنَ صَلاَةِ الصُّبْحِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Length of time Between Sahur and the Subh Prayer

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ اخْتِلاَفِ هِشَامٍ وَسَعِيدٍ عَلَى قَتَادَةَ فِيهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning the Different Reports from Hisham and Saeed from Qatadah about that

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الاِخْتِلاَفِ عَلَى سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ مِهْرَانَ فِي حَدِيثِ عَائِشَةَ فِي تَأْخِيرِ السُّحُورِ وَاخْتِلاَفِ أَلْفَاظِهِمْ
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning the Differences Reported from Sulaiman Bin mihran in the Hadith of 'Aishah about delaying Sahur, and the different wordings
Chapter: The Virtue of Sahur
Chapter: Invitation to Sahur
Chapter: Calling Sahur "Ghada" (Breakfast)

titles.arabic: باب فَصْلِ مَا بَيْنَ صِيَامِنَا وَصِيَامِ أَهْلِ الْكِتَابِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Difference Between our fasting and the Fasting of the people of the Book
Chapter: Sahur of Sawiq and Dates

titles.arabic: باب تَأْوِيلِ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى ‏ {‏ وَكُلُوا وَاشْرَبُوا حَتَّى يَتَبَيَّنَ لَكُمُ الْخَيْطُ الأَبْيَضُ مِنَ الْخَيْطِ الأَسْوَدِ مِنَ الْفَجْرِ ‏} ‏ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Meaning of Allah, the Most High's saying "And eat and drink until the white thread (light) of dawn appears to you distinct from the black thread (darkness of night)"
Chapter: What is dawn
Chapter: Fasting Ahead of Ramadan

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الاِخْتِلاَفِ عَلَى يَحْيَى بْنِ أَبِي كَثِيرٍ وَمُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو عَلَى أَبِي سَلَمَةَ فِيهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning the Difference Reported from Yahya bin Abi Kathir and Muhammad Bin 'Amr from Abu Salamah About that

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ حَدِيثِ أُمِّ سَلَمَةَ فِي ذَلِكَ
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning the Narration of Abu Salamah about that

titles.arabic: باب الاِخْتِلاَفِ عَلَى مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ فِيهِ
titles.english: Chapter: The Different Report from Muhammad Bin Ibrahim about that

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ اخْتِلاَفِ أَلْفَاظِ النَّاقِلِينَ لِخَبَرِ عَائِشَةَ فِيهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning the Different wordings used by those who reported the Narration of 'Aishah about that

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الاِخْتِلاَفِ عَلَى خَالِدِ بْنِ مَعْدَانَ فِي هَذَا الْحَدِيثِ ‏
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning the Differences Reported from Khalid bin Mad'an in this Hadith
Chapter: Fasting on the day of Doubt

titles.arabic: باب التَّسْهِيلِ فِي صِيَامِ يَوْمِ الشَّكِّ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Lenience Concerning Fasting the day of Doubt

titles.arabic: باب ثَوَابِ مَنْ قَامَ رَمَضَانَ وَصَامَهُ إِيمَانًا وَاحْتِسَابًا وَالاِخْتِلاَفِ عَلَى الزُّهْرِيِّ فِي الْخَبَرِ فِي ذَلِكَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Reward of one who prays Qiyam in Ramadan and fasts the month out of faith and hope for reward

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ اخْتِلاَفِ يَحْيَى بْنِ أَبِي كَثِيرٍ وَالنَّضْرِ بْنِ شَيْبَانَ فِيهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning the Differences in the Reports from Yahya bin Abi Kathir and An-Nadr bin Shaiban

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الصِّيَامِ وَالاِخْتِلاَفِ عَلَى أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ فِي حَدِيثِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ فِي ذَلِكَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The virtue of fasting, and the different reports from Abu Ishaq in the Hadith of 'Ali bin Abi Talib about that

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الاِخْتِلاَفِ عَلَى أَبِي صَالِحٍ فِي هَذَا الْحَدِيثِ
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning the Different Reports from Abu Salih in this Narration

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الاِخْتِلاَفِ عَلَى مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي يَعْقُوبَ فِي حَدِيثِ أَبِي أُمَامَةَ فِي فَضْلِ الصَّائِمِ
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning the differences in the reports from Muhammad bin Abi Yaqub in the Hadith of Abi Umamah About The Virtue Of Fasting

titles.arabic: باب ثَوَابِ مَنْ صَامَ يَوْمًا فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ وَذِكْرِ الاِخْتِلاَفِ عَلَى سُهَيْلِ بْنِ أَبِي صَالِحٍ فِي الْخَبَرِ فِي ذَلِكَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Reward of one who fasts one day in the cause of Allah, The Mighty And Sublime, And Mentioning The Differences Reported From Suhail Bin Abi Salih In The Narration About That

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الاِخْتِلاَفِ عَلَى سُفْيَانَ الثَّوْرِيِّ فِيهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning the differences reported from Sufyan Ath-Thawri

titles.arabic: باب مَا يُكْرَهُ مِنَ الصِّيَامِ فِي السَّفَرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: It is disliked to fast when traveling

titles.arabic: باب الْعِلَّةِ الَّتِي مِنْ أَجْلِهَا قِيلَ ذَلِكَ وَذِكْرِ الاِخْتِلاَفِ عَلَى مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ فِي حَدِيثِ جَابِرِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ فِي ذَلِكَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The reason why that was said, and mentioning the differences reported from Muhammad bin 'Abdur-Rahman In The Hadith Of Jabir Bin 'Abdullah About That

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الاِخْتِلاَفِ عَلَى عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْمُبَارَكِ
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning the different reports form 'Ali bin Al-Mubarak
Chapter: The Name of that Man

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ وَضْعِ الصِّيَامِ عَنِ الْمُسَافِرِ، وَالاِخْتِلاَفِ، عَلَى الأَوْزَاعِيِّ فِي خَبَرِ عَمْرِو بْنِ أُمَيَّةَ فِيهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Fasting is waived from the traveler and the differences reported from Al-Awzai in the narration Of 'Amr Bin 'Umayyah About That

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ اخْتِلاَفِ مُعَاوِيَةَ بْنِ سَلاَّمٍ وَعَلِيِّ بْنِ الْمُبَارَكِ فِي هَذَا الْحَدِيثِ
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning the Diffferences in the reports from Mu'awiyah bin Salam and Ali bin Al-Mubarak in this Narration

titles.arabic: باب فَضْلِ الإِفْطَارِ فِي السَّفَرِ عَلَى الصِّيَامِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The superiority of not fasting while traveling, over Fasting

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ قَوْلِهِ الصَّائِمُ فِي السَّفَرِ كَالْمُفْطِرِ فِي الْحَضَرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning the saying: "The one who fasts while travelling is like the one who does not fast while a resident"

titles.arabic: باب الصِّيَامِ فِي السَّفَرِ وَذِكْرِ اخْتِلاَفِ خَبَرِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ فِيهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Fasting While Traveling, And Mentioning The Differences Reported In The Narration Of Ibn 'Abbas about it
Chapter: Mentioning the Differences reported from Mansur

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الاِخْتِلاَفِ عَلَى سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ يَسَارٍ فِي حَدِيثِ حَمْزَةَ بْنِ عَمْرٍو فِيهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Mention of the different report from Sulaiman bin Yasar in the Narration of Hamzah bin 'Amr about that

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الاِخْتِلاَفِ عَلَى عُرْوَةَ فِي حَدِيثِ حَمْزَةَ فِيهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning the Differences Reported from 'Urwah in the Narration of Hamzah about it

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الاِخْتِلاَفِ عَلَى هِشَامِ بْنِ عُرْوَةَ فِيهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning the Differences in the Report from Hisham 'Urwah about it

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الاِخْتِلاَفِ عَلَى أَبِي نَضْرَةَ الْمُنْذِرِ بْنِ مَالِكِ بْنِ قُطَعَةَ فِيهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning the Differences Reported from Abu Nadrah Al-Mundhir bin Malik bin Qat'ah about it

titles.arabic: باب الرُّخْصَةِ لِلْمُسَافِرِ أَنْ يَصُومَ بَعْضًا وَيُفْطِرَ بَعْضًا ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Concession Allowing a Traveler to fast for part of the Journey and not to fast for part of it

titles.arabic: باب الرُّخْصَةِ فِي الإِفْطَارِ لِمَنْ حَضَرَ شَهْرَ رَمَضَانَ فَصَامَ ثُمَّ سَافَرَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Concession Allowing one who starts fasting in Ramadan, then travels to break his fast

titles.arabic: باب وَضْعِ الصِّيَامِ عَنِ الْحُبْلَى، وَالْمُرْضِعِ، ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Fasting is waived for pregnant and breastfeeding women

titles.arabic: باب تَأْوِيلِ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ ‏ {‏ وَعَلَى الَّذِينَ يُطِيقُونَهُ فِدْيَةٌ طَعَامُ مِسْكِينٍ ‏} ‏ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: Interpreting the saying of Allah, The Mighty And Sublime: "And as for those who can fast with difficulty,(e.g. an old man), they have (a choice either to fast or) to feed a Miskin (poor person) (for every day)"
Chapter: Fasting is Waived for Menstruating Women

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا طَهُرَتِ الْحَائِضُ أَوْ قَدِمَ الْمُسَافِرُ فِي رَمَضَانَ هَلْ يَصُومُ بَقِيَّةَ يَوْمِهِ ‏.‏ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: If a Menstruating Woman becomes pure or a traveler Returns During Ramadan, Should they fast for the rest of that day?

titles.arabic: باب إِذَا لَمْ يُجْمِعْ مِنَ اللَّيْلِ هَلْ يَصُومُ ذَلِكَ الْيَوْمَ مِنَ التَّطَوُّعِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: If a person did not form the intention of fasting from the night before, can he observe a voluntary fast that day?

titles.arabic: باب النِّيَّةِ فِي الصِّيَامِ وَالاِخْتِلاَفِ عَلَى طَلْحَةَ بْنِ يَحْيَى بْنِ طَلْحَةَ فِي خَبَرِ عَائِشَةَ فِيهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The intention to fast, and the differences reported from Talhah bin Yahya in the narration of 'Aishah about it

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ اخْتِلاَفِ النَّاقِلِينَ لِخَبَرِ حَفْصَةَ فِي ذَلِكَ
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning the Differences Narrated by those who Reported the Narration from Hafsah concerning that

titles.arabic: باب صَوْمِ نَبِيِّ اللَّهِ دَاوُدَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلاَمُ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The fast of Prophet Dawud, peace be upon him

titles.arabic: باب صَوْمِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم - بِأَبِي هُوَ وَأُمِّي - وَذِكْرِ اخْتِلاَفِ النَّاقِلِينَ لِلْخَبَرِ فِي ذَلِكَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The fast of the Prophet

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الاِخْتِلاَفِ عَلَى عَطَاءٍ فِي الْخَبَرِ فِيهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning the Differences Reported form Ata' in the Narrations about that

titles.arabic: باب النَّهْىِ عَنْ صِيَامِ الدَّهْرِ، وَذِكْرِ الاِخْتِلاَفِ، عَلَى مُطَرِّفِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ فِي الْخَبَرِ فِيهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Prohibition of fasting for a lifetime, and mentioning the differences reported from Mutarrif Bin 'Abdullah In The Narrations About It

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الاِخْتِلاَفِ عَلَى غَيْلاَنَ بْنِ جَرِيرٍ فِيهِ
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning the different reports from Ghaylan bin Jarir about it
Chapter: Fasting Continually

titles.arabic: باب صَوْمِ ثُلُثَىِ الدَّهْرِ وَذِكْرِ اخْتِلاَفِ النَّاقِلِينَ لِلْخَبَرِ فِي ذَلِكَ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Fasting for two thirds of one's lifetime

titles.arabic: باب صَوْمِ يَوْمٍ وَإِفْطَارِ يَوْمٍ وَذِكْرِ اخْتِلاَفِ أَلْفَاظِ النَّاقِلِينَ فِي ذَلِكَ لِخَبَرِ عَبْدِ
titles.english: Chapter: Fasting one day, and not fasting one day, and the difference in the wording of the transmitters Of The Narration Of 'Abdullah Bin 'Amr About It

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الزِّيَادَةِ فِي الصِّيَامِ وَالنُّقْصَانِ وَذِكْرِ اخْتِلاَفِ النَّاقِلِينَ لِخَبَرِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو فِيهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Mention of fasting more or less, and mentioning the differences reported in the narration Of 'Abdullah Bin 'Amr About That

titles.arabic: باب صَوْمِ عَشْرَةِ أَيَّامٍ مِنَ الشَّهْرِ وَاخْتِلاَفِ أَلْفَاظِ النَّاقِلِينَ لِخَبَرِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو فِيهِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Fasting ten days of the month, and the Different Wording Reported by the Narrators in the Narration Of 'Abdullah Bin 'Amr About It

titles.arabic: باب صِيَامِ خَمْسَةِ أَيَّامٍ مِنَ الشَّهْرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Fasting Five Days of the Month

titles.arabic: باب صِيَامِ أَرْبَعَةِ أَيَّامٍ مِنَ الشَّهْرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Fasting Four Days of the Month

titles.arabic: باب صَوْمِ ثَلاَثَةِ أَيَّامٍ مِنَ الشَّهْرِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Fasting Three Days of The Month

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الاِخْتِلاَفِ عَلَى أَبِي عُثْمَانَ فِي حَدِيثِ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ فِي صِيَامِ ثَلاَثَةِ أَيَّامٍ مِنَ كُلِّ شَهْرٍ
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning The Differences Reported From Abu 'Uthman In The Hadith Of Abu Hurairah Regarding Fasting Three Days Out Of Each Month

titles.arabic: باب كَيْفَ يَصُومُ ثَلاَثَةَ أَيَّامٍ مِنْ كُلِّ شَهْرٍ وَذِكْرِ اخْتِلاَفِ النَّاقِلِينَ لِلْخَبَرِ فِي ذَلِكَ ‏.‏
titles.english: Chapter: How to Fast Three Days of Each Month, And Mentioning The Differences Reported by The Narrators In The Narration Regarding that

titles.arabic: باب ذِكْرِ الاِخْتِلاَفِ عَلَى مُوسَى بْنِ طَلْحَةَ فِي الْخَبَرِ فِي صِيَامِ ثَلاَثَةِ أَيَّامٍ مِنَ الشَّهْرِ
titles.english: Chapter: Mentioning The Differences Reported From Musa Bin Talhah In The Narration About Fasting three days of each month
Chapter: Fasting Two days Of The Month
Chapter: The Obligation of Zakah
Chapter: Stern Warning Against Withholding Zakah
Chapter: The One Who Withholds Zakah
Chapter: The Punishment Or One Who Withholds Zakah
Chapter: Zakah On Cannels
Chapter: The One Who Withholds The Zakah Of Camels

titles.arabic: باب سُقُوطِ الزَّكَاةِ عَنِ الإِبِلِ، إِذَا كَانَتْ رِسْلاً لأَهْلِهَا وَلِحُمُولَتِهِمْ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Waiving Zakah On Camels If They Are Used To Carry People And Goods
Chapter: Zahah On Cattle
Chapter: The One Who Withholds Zakah On Cattle
Chapter: Zakah On Sheep
Chapter: The One Who Withholds Zakah On Sheep

titles.arabic: باب الْجَمْعِ بَيْنَ الْمُتَفَرِّقِ وَالتَّفْرِيقِ بَيْنَ الْمُجْتَمِعِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Combining What Is Separate And Separating What Is Combined

titles.arabic: باب صَلاَةِ الإِمَامِ عَلَى صَاحِبِ الصَّدَقَةِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: The Ruler Supplicating For Blessings Upon The Giver Of Sadaqah
Chapter: When There Is An Infraction In The Sadaqah (Collected)

titles.arabic: باب إِعْطَاءِ السَّيِّدِ الْمَالَ بِغَيْرِ اخْتِيَارِ الْمُصَدِّقِ ‏‏
titles.english: Chapter: Owner Giving Something Without The Zakah Collector Choosing It
Chapter: Zakah on Horses
Chapter: Zakah On Slaves
Chapter: Zakah On Silver
Chapter: Zakah On Jewelry
Chapter: The One Who Withoholds zakah Due On His Wealath
Chapter: Zakah On Dates
